results.title: Ayodhya donation scandal recalls 1983 Kashi Vishwanath theft that reshaped temple governance
results.description: The theft of Shivling ornaments triggered the Shri Kashi Vishwanath Temple Act, 1983 -- a law that shifted the temple's management from mahants to a government-backed trust.

results.title: Complete the SIR process, Punjab CM appeals to electorates
results.description: Chandigarh: Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann on Wednesday called upon eligible voters to complete the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) process on priority, asserting that participation is essential...

results.title: Chandigarh Police bust Pakistan-linked narco-terror, fake currency network
results.description: Expanding its investigation into the daylight murder of a pharmacy cashier in Sector 11 last month, Chandigarh Police has dismantled a cross-border and inter-state network involved in the supply of illegal arms, methamphetamine and Fake Indian Currency Notes (FICN), arresting four more accused, including the alleged main conspirator lodged in Kapurthala Jail. The latest arrests [...]
